detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KISHURAI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (KISHURAI.sol#445-507):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (KISHURAI.sol#489)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (KISHURAI.sol#521-533)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (KISHURAI.sol#495)
		- _feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount) (KISHURAI.sol#541)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (KISHURAI.sol#505)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (KISHURAI.sol#627)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (KISHURAI.sol#607)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (KISHURAI.sol#609)
	KISHURAI._rOwned (KISHURAI.sol#235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KISHURAI._takeTeam(uint256) (KISHURAI.sol#621-629)
	- KISHURAI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (KISHURAI.sol#603-617)
	- KISHURAI.balanceOf(address) (KISHURAI.sol#363-367)
	- KISHURAI.constructor() (KISHURAI.sol#305-327)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (KISHURAI.sol#505)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (KISHURAI.sol#635)
	KISHURAI._rTotal (KISHURAI.sol#251) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KISHURAI._getCurrentSupply() (KISHURAI.sol#759-769)
	- KISHURAI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (KISHURAI.sol#633-639)
	- KISHURAI.constructor() (KISHURAI.sol#305-327)
	- KISHURAI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (KISHURAI.sol#419-427)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [KISHURAI._transfer(address,address,uint256)](KISHURAI.sol#L445-L507):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](KISHURAI.sol#L489)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](KISHURAI.sol#L521-L533)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](KISHURAI.sol#L495)
		- [_feeAddrWallet2.transfer(amount)](KISHURAI.sol#L541)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](KISHURAI.sol#L505)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](KISHURAI.sol#L627)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](KISHURAI.sol#L607)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](KISHURAI.sol#L609)
	[KISHURAI._rOwned](KISHURAI.sol#L235) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KISHURAI._takeTeam(uint256)](KISHURAI.sol#L621-L629)
	- [KISHURAI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](KISHURAI.sol#L603-L617)
	- [KISHURAI.balanceOf(address)](KISHURAI.sol#L363-L367)
	- [KISHURAI.constructor()](KISHURAI.sol#L305-L327)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount)](KISHURAI.sol#L505)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](KISHURAI.sol#L635)
	[KISHURAI._rTotal](KISHURAI.sol#L251) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [KISHURAI._getCurrentSupply()](KISHURAI.sol#L759-L769)
	- [KISHURAI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](KISHURAI.sol#L633-L639)
	- [KISHURAI.constructor()](KISHURAI.sol#L305-L327)
	- [KISHURAI.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](KISHURAI.sol#L419-L427)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in KISHURAI.openTrading() (KISHURAI.sol#547-571):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (KISHURAI.sol#557)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (KISHURAI.sol#559)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (KISHURAI.sol#559)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (KISHURAI.sol#567)
	KISHURAI.tradingOpen (KISHURAI.sol#283) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- KISHURAI.openTrading() (KISHURAI.sol#547-571)
